programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) We take a look back at the contestant's journey and find out who wins The Block 2020 as their homes go up for auction.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) It's Fans vs Faves on The Block this year. The contestants must transform five very different houses in one cul-de-sac into luxury family homes, all without plans.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) The arrival of the all-star Faves sees the competition get real. We find out which houses the teams will choose to transform.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block: Episode
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.
